title: The Institute Launches Program for Developing Nations
summary: Institute founder, Wally Hickel, long aspired to share Alaska’s Owner State Model of resource governance with other parts of the world. Today, we are excited to be making that dream a reality. Last June, the Institute’s Director traveled to Nairobi Kenya with former Governor Bill Walker and board me...

title: Applications Open for Arctic Resilient Communities Youth Fellowship
summary: The Institute is now accepting applications for the Arctic Resilient Communities Youth Fellowship.
